caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering is seated at a desk. He is positioned in a studio setting, facing slightly to the left of the frame with a professional microphone on a boom arm positioned in front of him. Behind him is a white wall featuring repeated logos with the text "UNICORN HUSTLE" and five gold stars. Above him, blue text reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black monitor and a blue and white container with red text that says "TALK OUT". Small logos containing a question mark and the text "Talk Out" are visible in the lower-left corners. Across the sequence, the man remains in a nearly static pose, looking off-camera with a neutral expression, showing very little movement between the frames.
